game_info.title: Tower Fortress
game_info.concept:
A mysterious tower has risen! It emits plumes of noxious green smoke from

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/tower-fortress/id1290165431

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

A mysterious tower has risen! It emits plumes of noxious green smoke from
its summit making people sick. Strange creatures infest the tower but if
nobody tries to ascend it we will all be doomed!

Are you that hero?.....

Features:

-Randomised for replay. Every run is different!
-Evolve your abilities and skill to progress ever further up the tower!
-4 Themed zones to ascend!
-Unique hazards and monsters to each zone!
-4 Epic End Zone Boss Fights!
-Loads of Gun Types including, Laser, T Gun, Bubble Gun and Shotgun!
-25 Suits to unlock each with unique abilities that affect play.
-Upgrade yourself at the end of each level with 20 upgrade abilities!



-Important information-
This game contains third party advertising and cross promotion for other nitrome games, both which can be removed via a one time In App Purchase.
game_info.description: Ascend the mysterious tower that emits noxious green smoke! You are a hero equipped with a suit of armor and a powerful arm-cannon. Your goal is to climb the procedurally generated tower, defeat the mechanical and biological horrors infesting it, and destroy the source of the corruption at the summit. Collect gems to boost your score and find weapon crates to upgrade your firepower. Watch out for rising toxic gas and deadly spikes!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left/Right: Move horizontally
- Arrow Up: Aim weapon upwards / Interact
- Arrow Down: Crouch / Drop through thin platforms
- Space: Jump (Press again for Double Jump if unlocked/enabled)
- Z: Shoot weapon
- Shift: Dash (if ability cooldown is ready)
- ENTER: Start Game
- ESC: Pause / Unpause
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screens)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and physics stability test. The bot will perform random movements and jumps to ensure the physics engine (gravity, collisions) doesn't trap the player or cause crashes.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot generates random input vectors for movement and jumping. It periodically shoots to test projectile instantiation.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game should run without errors. The player might die or fall, but the application state should remain valid (no NaN coordinates).

TEST_1.expected: The game should run without errors. The player might die or fall, but the application state should remain valid (no NaN coordinates).

TEST_2.test_description: Vertical ascension stress test. The bot attempts to climb the tower to test platform placement and camera scrolling.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot locates the nearest platform above it and steers towards its X coordinate, jumping when underneath or close.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should ascend at least a portion of the tower, verifying that platforms are reachable and the camera tracks correctly.

TEST_3.test_description: Combat and projectile system test. Verifies collision detection between projectiles and enemies.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The bot stays stationary but aims and fires continuously in varying directions while enemies approach.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Enemies should take damage and die when hit. Score should increase. Logs should reflect projectile impacts.
